prose: **Benzaldehyde Fukui Reactivity** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single‐point on the user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz` (no re-optimization). SCF converged. No warnings reported. Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF) were used to compute the Fukui indices. Most electrophilic site: C atom 3 (f⁺ = 0.39938966).  Command: `cli.py fukui --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 benzaldehyde.xyz --out …/benzaldehyde_fukui.json`.
